name: oci
description: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure management via the OCI CLI. Ask Claude to run any oci command — Compute, OKE, Object Storage, Networking, IAM, and more.

tools.name: oci
tools.description:
Run any OCI CLI command. Pass all arguments after 'oci' as an array.

Examples:
- List compute instances: ["compute", "instance", "list", "--compartment-id", "ocid1..."]
- List compartments: ["iam", "compartment", "list", "--compartment-id", "<tenancy-ocid>"]
- OKE clusters: ["ce", "cluster", "list", "--compartment-id", "ocid1..."]
- Object Storage buckets: ["os", "bucket", "list", "--compartment-id", "ocid1..."]
- VCNs: ["network", "vcn", "list", "--compartment-id", "ocid1..."]
- Instance details: ["compute", "instance", "get", "--instance-id", "ocid1..."]
